title: Code quality score 0.73 indicates lint warnings present
suggestion: Run tsc --noEmit and eslint to identify and fix remaining lint issues

title: Maintainability score 0.51 — verbose file-level JSDoc blocks inflate line count
evidence: Every file in src/ and tests/ carries a 10-15 line block comment header (e.g. src/knowledgeGraph.ts:1-24, src/loader.ts:1-16)
suggestion: Consider trimming boilerplate headers; the code is already well-structured and self-documenting

title: Match deduplication filters BR-Football-Dataset to only Série B/C
evidence: src/loader.ts:184 — .filter() keeps only Série B/C from the extended dataset to avoid double-counting matches already in dedicated files
suggestion: Good design choice — but discards extended stats (corners, shots, attacks) for Série A matches that the dedicated files lack

title: Team name normalization handles ambiguous bases correctly
evidence: src/normalize.ts:79 AMBIGUOUS_BASES set distinguishes Atlético-MG vs Atlético-GO; COMBINED_ALIASES at line 86 folds Atlético-PR onto Athletico
suggestion: Robust approach for the known cases; new ambiguous clubs would need manual alias additions
